gaps.title: GBP Automated Posting
gaps.description: Google Business Profile has no free public API for posts. Bot drafts posts; Will pastes manually.
gaps.paid_solution: Semrush Local (£35/mo) or BrightLocal (£29/mo) can post to GBP automatically.
gaps.free_alternative: Bot drafts post → Will copies from outputs/ into GBP dashboard. 2 minutes/week.

gaps.title: GBP Review Monitoring
gaps.description: No automated way to detect new GBP reviews without paid tools. Will must check manually.
gaps.paid_solution: BrightLocal (£29/mo) monitors reviews and alerts via email.
gaps.free_alternative: Set up Google Alerts for 'battleshipreset.com' + manual weekly check in GBP dashboard.

gaps.title: Instagram Scheduling
gaps.description: Meta API allows posting but not scheduling. All posts are immediate.
gaps.free_alternative: Post immediately at optimal time (7-9am or 7-9pm UK). Bot calculates best window.

gaps.title: Landing Page A/B Testing
gaps.description: battleshipreset.com (Carrd) has no built-in A/B testing. Can't test headline variants automatically.
gaps.paid_solution: Google Optimize (free but deprecated) or VWO (£35/mo) or Unbounce (£55/mo).
gaps.free_alternative: Manual variant testing: alternate headlines weekly, track CTR from UTM params.

gaps.title: CRM / Pipeline Management
gaps.description: Client tracking is in a JSON file. No visual pipeline, no automated follow-up sequences beyond email.
gaps.free_alternative: Current clients/ JSON + Flask dashboard. Sufficient below 20 clients.

gaps.title: Email Marketing Platform
gaps.description: All emails sent via Mailgun transactional. No broadcast list, no sequences beyond the pipeline.
gaps.paid_solution: Mailchimp free (500 contacts, 1000 sends/month). ConvertKit free (1000 subs).
gaps.free_alternative: Pipeline handles all client emails. Add Mailchimp free tier when building a lead magnet list.

gaps.title: Accounting Software
gaps.description: Expenses tracked in finances.md. No VAT tracking, no HMRC-ready reports.
gaps.free_alternative: Wave is free and HMRC-compatible. Set up when revenue starts.

gaps.title: Keyword Rank Tracking
gaps.description: No way to track where battleshipreset.com ranks for target keywords automatically.
gaps.free_alternative: Google Search Console (free) — once site gets traffic. Manual search checks weekly.
